textByHashes.e0e1f10e0f8070cff121cc7dcf71333d8e65a68a: I don't care about that, I have far too much work to do. Let the authorities take care of things like murder and stop snooping around my office!
textByHashes.fb5ba407b9416f8f03cb76d7c080c17cb3a34014: I don't have time to talk to you. Go away!
textByHashes.95da364d89a7b89ebaf1b877ac776e8c61c5a39c: I'm not falling for that one!
textByHashes.b81b64466d9245ad6b8e94fc58fec6c8ec66485b: Because.... because.... I bribed a wizard to put a spell on him so he would believe everything I say!!
textByHashes.2a045c6ff154af15448d615798a78e75c4dca930: So that I could make him work longer without paying him more!
textByHashes.3c7e9e0aea08cfbcb12cd40c554246d9b62c2e6c: I...I... I KILLED HIM! So I wouldn't have to pay him and no one would know. I put his body in the next load of sand.
textByHashes.fc8e0990cac4efd6891df10221711d75d2edcda7: Nice day for sand isn't it?
textByHashes.70d9018231bdbdb5d7e341ed33222932bb35ba07: Sand is yellow, Sand is grand, Sand puts money, In my hand!
textByHashes.468a40da41aedb53598de15c1eb3e6a68bebcf5a: I'm Sandy of Sandy's Sand Corp, are you in the sand business?
